title: Command Center
description: Trung tam dieu khien trang chu gom weather, calendar, clock, notes, todo, AI quick access, visitor counter, online status, server status, notifications, recent activity va favorite apps.

title: AI Center
description: Khong gian AI gom multi AI chat, prompt library, prompt collection, prompt history, prompt optimizer, prompt translator, AI model switcher va AI workflow.

title: Download Center
description: Khu tai ve co search, categories, download counter, version, changelog, rating, favorite va file preview.

title: Media Center
description: Trung tam media gom videos, shorts, images, music, podcast, gallery va playlist.

title: Project Center
description: Quan ly du an gom progress, roadmap, timeline, screenshots, demo, features, bugs, changelog va team.

title: Knowledge Center (Wiki)
description: Wiki ca nhan ho tro markdown, categories, tags, search, bookmark va related articles.

title: Learning Center
description: Khong gian hoc tap gom courses, lessons, progress, quiz, certificates va notes.

title: Community
description: Cong dong gom forum, comments, reactions, follow, profile va leaderboard.

title: User Dashboard
description: Bang nguoi dung gom avatar, profile, settings, saved, favorites, activity va notification.

title: Admin Panel
description: Bang quan tri gom dashboard, user manager, content manager, analytics, logs, database monitor va backup.

title: AI Automation
description: Tu dong hoa AI gom auto title, auto description, auto tags, auto translation, auto summary, auto voice va auto thumbnail.

title: Creator Studio
description: Studio sang tao gom thumbnail manager, video manager, SEO score, script generator va hashtag generator.

title: Analytics
description: Thong ke traffic, devices, browsers, countries, downloads, AI usage va charts.

title: Store
description: Cua hang san pham so gom digital products, membership, orders, coupons va checkout.

title: Cloud Storage
description: Kho luu tru cloud gom upload, download, preview, share, folder va recent files.

title: Notification Center
description: Trung tam thong bao qua email, push, in-app, Discord va Telegram.

title: API Center
description: Khu API gom API docs, playground, API key, logs va examples.

title: Developer Hub
description: Hub lap trinh gom git, releases, changelog, packages va CI/CD.

title: Security Center
description: Bao mat gom login history, sessions, devices, two factor, permissions va audit logs.

title: Smart Search
description: Tim Projects, Videos, Downloads, AI, Articles, Users, Files va Settings trong mot o.

title: App Launcher
description: Start menu cho favorite apps, recent apps, categories va search.

title: Widgets Engine
description: Dong co widget gom drag drop, resize, hide, pin va save layout.

title: Marketplace
description: Cho module gom plugins, themes, scripts, AI agents va extensions.

title: Mobile/PWA
description: Mobile va PWA gom responsive, installable, offline va sync data.

title: Modern UI Kit
description: Bo UI hien dai gom glassmorphism, neon, gradient, blur, motion, smooth scroll, skeleton loading, command palette, dock navigation, floating action button, dynamic sidebar va mega menu.

title: Da ngon ngu (i18n)
description: Chuyen ngu, luu theo user va ho tro RTL.

title: Accessibility Center
description: Trung tam tiep can gom phong to chu, tuong phan cao, screen-reader mode va dieu huong ban phim.

title: Gamification
description: Game hoa hoat dong gom XP, huy hieu, streak va bang xep hang hoat dong.

title: Onboarding/Tour Guide
description: Huong dan tung buoc cho nguoi dung moi.

title: Feedback & Survey
description: Gop y nhanh, khao sat popup va NPS.

title: Helpdesk/Ticketing
description: Ho tro khach hang va quan ly trang thai ticket.

title: Status Page
description: Trang trang thai gom uptime, su co va lich bao tri he thong.

title: Feature Flag Dashboard
description: Bat tat module runtime va A/B testing don gian.

title: Cookie & Consent Manager
description: Quan ly quyen rieng tu va theo doi co xin phep.

title: Data Export/Import
description: Tai du lieu ca nhan, backup va restore cau hinh local.

title: Referral & Affiliate
description: Ma gioi thieu va theo doi hoa hong.

title: Wishlist & Compare
description: Wishlist va so sanh dung cho Store va Download Center.

title: Team Collaboration
description: Bang cong viec nhom, thanh vien, binh luan va dong bo tien do.

title: Form Builder
description: Tao bieu mau, xem truoc, thu thap va xuat phan hoi.

title: Workflow Automation
description: Tao quy trinh trigger, dieu kien, hanh dong va nhat ky chay.
